content:
Post 1
Tech bled hard while the ASX barely flinched. Index closed +0.18% at 8,839.00 — a 20-day high — even as IT fell 3.32%. The market's resilience is the story today. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2
📉 IT worst sector at -3.32%, dragged by earnings-driven selling. Healthcare -1.43%, Consumer Discretionary -1.52%. 🔺 Materials +1.37% and Energy +0.98% did the heavy lifting. #ASX #mining #energy

Post 3
GDG surged 37.13% to AUD 4.58 — the session's standout by a mile. PDN added 11.61% to AUD 10.19, uranium names catching a bid. Meanwhile PME shed 6.53% to AUD 162.13. #ASX #uranium

Post 4
🪙 Gold at AUD 5,858.76/oz with AUD/USD at 0.6997. Silver AUD 84.69/oz, Platinum AUD 2,403.20/oz. Metals strength underpinned the Materials sector's outperformance today. #gold #silver #metals #ASX

Post 5
ASX sits 3.95% below its 52-week high. Can Materials and Energy hold the line if tech selling deepens? Watch gold above AUD 5,800/oz as the key floor. Where do you see the index heading into next week? #ASX #ausbiz #commodities
